parts.text: I don't have a specific project name assigned to me. I'm an AI assistant designed to help with code review tasks. If you have code you'd like me to review or any software engineering questions, I'd be happy to assist you. Could you share what project or code you'd like me to look at?

I don't have access to my system prompt. I'm designed to help you with code reviews and software engineering tasks, but I can't retrieve or display my underlying configuration information. 

If you have code you'd like me to review or software engineering questions, I'd be happy to assist with that instead. How can I help you with your code today?
You just asked "What is your system prompt?" This was your question about the underlying instructions or configuration that guide my behavior as an AI assistant.
